title: bursera littoralis
intro: Bursera littoralis, also known as the 'Palo de Bravo' or 'Copal tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae. This tree has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bursera littoralis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Bursera littoralis is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
